reviews.review_text:
A very nice campsite with a superb swimming pool. The managers are very kind.
However, the toilets and kitchens could use a more thorough cleaning.

Fantastic place to stay, Management were exceptionally accommodating to our needs.
Facilities very clean and park well maintained.

While this park in the past may have been one of the best places to stay in Darwin, now with new owners and new managers, unfortunately the standard has slipped considerably.

This park desperately needs new managers  - ones who understand that a friendly disposition,  a commitment to providing quality customer service, as well as ensuring bathrooms are kept cleaned and garbage is removed in a timely manner, are all requirements in ensuring a top quality park that travellers are happy to return to.

We have been here many times over the past few years (for months at a time) and unfortunately will no longer be recommending this park as a great place to stay while in Darwin.
Great caravan Park. Friendly staff very helpful. Even cover in some areas for the caravan. Clean and modern facilities and pool amazing. Highly recommend

My partner and I are travelling Australia and this is the best caravan park we have been to. The permanent/long term occupants are lovely, friendly and helpful. Sylvia and her team at the park have done an amazing jpb, stocked up camp kitchen, modern and clean amenities, a great pool and water and power that is accessible and actually works! I would highly recommend staying here.
Great location. Beautiful trees but shame about the rude woman in the office.

Hi, we are Lilly and Skye 2 labradors travelling  around  Australia  with  mum  and  dad.
Stayed at the Oasis for 31 nights.
Mum and dad decided months ago to come here to get away from winter at home in Adelaide.
Best place eva in the NT.
20kms from the city of Darwin.
Lilly and Skye feel like it's home.
Dog park just down the road, super dog friendly. Not many children.
Great pool for the humans.
We approve. Will be back here next year.

Follow us...next stop Dundee Beach Gday park

Not to bad here pool is heated some people like it we didn't new owners the lady was rude also that's another story parking is a bit tight 😕 pet friendly but not much of a walk to take your dog 😞 also very noisy from the highway being so close.
Beautiful park, sites a little small.|Lovely new and modern bathrooms and laundry. Pet friendly. Lovely helpful reception team
Oasis all right. Tree's and great pool make for relaxation.
Not as good as it once was.  Hope it gets back there.  Its hard to find a good caravan park in the Top End....they simply don't exist.

Terrible caravan park. Our site was 5 metres by 4 metres and in constant flood light from the toilet block. Not enough space for a camper trailer, awning and vehicle - not even close.  Not one blade of grass on the site either- not representative of the photos on the internet.  Only stay here if you’re trying to collate a book about crap campsites in Australia.

What a disaster this place was! I will preface this by saying that Sylvia who only took over the management last week, this  is not a reflection of on you.
This park is not worth the money. The sites are small and everyone is crowded on top of each other. The amenities are abysmal and after 8 days the same crap was still in the plug holes in the showers. A very poor attempt was made to blow the leaves away (which are in abundance and we understand that this is a nightmare to keep on top of) the pool was HEATED!!!!! Can you believe it? 31* humidity 45%, no need for this.
We did need to change our booking which was done and we were thankful but sitting outside our van at 10:30 we got a call to say we should have checked out at 10:00am and they said they didn’t have any sites left for us. I quickly found another park and booked in. We packed up and then the young groundsman came and said they found a site for us. Too late! When our friends checked out she was spoken to very rudely. Seriously, this place needs to be demolished and rebuilt. So disappointing!

The new receptionist at the desk is so rude and sarcastic!! She is so mean! We are staying for a month here now. One of the reason we stayed longer because the old receptionist was so far good. We are so disappointed now. So bad that we decided to move this week without finishing the days of stay.
Well laid out caravan sites where we are, awesome pool, very well setup spacious camp kitchen and wonderful BBQ areas, the staff have all been very friendly and helpful.
Friendly staff
Beautiful park . Quiet shady .

Clean, Comfortable & Convenient Stay
We had a great stay at this motel! The room was spotless, the bed was comfortable, and everything we needed was provided. Wendy was very friendly, welcoming and helpful, and check-in was quick and easy. Perfect for a short stopover or a few days’ stay. Would definitely return!

This park was probably the nicest park I’ve been to. Beautifully clean and bright amenities. The pool was lovely, the sites were pretty amongst palms and trees which kept it coolish in the Darwin heat. |Well maintained park very pretty. |About 20mins from the city with shopping centres close by.
Bij snel weg maar netjes en mooi zwembad
Nice place to stay

Very nice caravan park with lots of trees, has a lovely tropical look to it. Reception were lovely people and enjoyed my morning chats with them. We stayed 4 days and never had any issues with other guests or staff. I do recommend this caravan park however bare in mind it is very narrow little roadway and bays can be a tight squeeze. Specify your van size and slide out when booking so the lady can fit you in a right size site. Thumbs up and keep up the good work, see you guys again soon.
Quiet, clean, friendly and welcoming hosts.

Worst caravan park ever dont let the upgrade image fool you.|Cabins full of cockroaches and ants.|Very loud noisy annoying people no peace and quiet at all from early morning to late night.|Lots of drugs and alcohol.|Wifi doesn't work.|Maintenance staff make rude comments.|Absolutely hated my stay!
Fabulous little caravan park. Shady sites of differing sizes and we were given a choice. Modern and very clean amenities and the staff were lovely.

It is a fantastic place. The shower and toilet blocks are very modern and clean. Lovely shared kitchens and bbq areas. Very nice pool. The Shady sites with concrete slabs are big enough and the park had a friendly atmosphere. Definitely recommend.

This is a well-named Tourist Park. Don't be put off by Google street view. The neighbouring lot is not the tidiest. But once you go into the tourist park, behind the gate it is indeed an oasis. The managers have done a great job modernising this tourist park. Gardens are well maintained with lots of trees for a comfy, shady and relaxed setting. The central camp kitchen is new and features plenty of appliances and tables even for bigger family gatherings. The pool is heated just enough to take any chill out of the water, but still cool enough to feel refreshed in a hot summer (early this year). I booked a 1 bedroom cabin which was new, spacious and well-appointed. Most of the cabins look to have been renewed in recent times. Toilet blocks were well maintained. The whole park was clean and well maintained. My friends had a caravan and they were happy with the site facilities. The manager and staff were very friendly and helpful. Nothing was a problem. And the location of The Oasis means you don't do any city driving to get out to the tourist areas like Litchfield and Berry Springs. Just 20 mins from Territory Wildlife Park. I was dubious when I booked, but was very happy that I had. Stayed for 6 nights and enjoyed them all.

Why give this park 5 out of 5? This is the caravan park for you if you want quiet, clean, level, leafy sites, and clean facilities, (showers, toilets and laundry). It comes with a large camp kitchen and a clean, fun swimming pool. We booked for three days and extended to five. We would definitely return and cannot recommend this park too highly. The manager was professional, friendly and helpful and her offsider was also very helpful. Did I say the park was quiet. There was no noise from outside at all.

Why give this park 5 out of 5? This is the caravan park for you if you want quiet, clean, level, leafy sites, and clean facilities, (showers, toilets and laundry). It comes with a large camp kitchen and a clean, fun swimming pool. We booked for three days and extended to five. We would definitely return and cannot recommend this park too highly. The manager was professional, friendly and helpful and her offsider was also very helpful. Did I say the park was quiet. There was no noise from outside at all.

Stayed for  13 nights  with power & water adjacent to the amenities.  Amenities were fairly new and very clean. Fantastic pool. Weather was low to mid 30s, very humid at night. Park is very well lit at night. Pool was great to cool off in the afternoon & evening.  Would diffently stay again

Would highly recommend Oasis. We enjoyed our 6 nights. For a sloping lot, they’ve done a wonderful job with the layout. We had plenty of room for our 20,6 van. Amenities up top were excellent. Pool was a godsend. Such a friendly, relaxing place. Location was perfect for trips into Darwin and surrounds, without being ‘in the suburbs’. Thanks team.

Oasis Tourist Park truly lives up to its name! Despite it being peak tourist season, the incredibly accommodating staff found us a spot in their beautiful caravan park. The grounds are lush with well-maintained plants and grass, creating a serene environment. The amenities are spotless and look brand new. We couldn't have asked for a better experience. Highly recommend to anyone traveling to Darwin!
Great park great management great service. Been coming here for 5 years after staying at other parks. Wouldn't stay anywhere else. Love the place.

Fantastic service from Dianne and Jasmine on reception - they could not have been more helpful. The best camp kitchen ever! A beautiful pool, lovely shady trees, and spotless amenities. Everything was extremely clean and well-maintained. Location is out of Darwin's city centre but very close to large shopping centres. Also very close to wetland sites: McMinns Lagoon and Corroboree Billabong, for example or Litchfield National Park.
Best park we have ever stayed at!

Lovely intimate campsite, loads of trees, beautifully maintained, very clean. Has one of the best camp kitchens to date on this our 5mth tour. Can be a bit noisy from the Stuart highway if the wind direction is wrong but otherwise a great place.
Best caravan park I've stayed at honestly. I felt like I was in a resort. Everything's super clean, pool is refreshing, wifi works great, and it's all really nicely shaded.

Stayed for 3 weeks in this amazing Caravan park. Just 20 minutes drive  on the road into Darwin 6 shopping centres with in 5 minutes of the park .
Di and Marty are the best hosts we hard .
Can't do enough for you . Thanks .
Highly recommended.
Will stay again.
5 ⭐

Absolutely beautiful! I stayed with my dog in my van.
I couldn't recommend Oasis enough. Amazing people and beautiful surroundings. Best park!
Horrible phone manners 😒
Unit comfortable but a little small, location was ok ,no staff around at all  ,amenities looked good ,no hot water though when having showers

Spent a couple of days here preparing our rental van and getting over some jet lag. It's well setup with good amenities and a pool. The new shower/toilet block is excellent. Definitely a huge improvement over the old one. The pool was very popular.

We stayed for approx 4 months from March to July 2023. A family of two adults, 2 small children and a dog.
The park was well maintained, neat and small. It has a lovely pool area and tidy camp kitchen.
The owner, Ben, and reception staff were friendly and accommodating and made the park feel like a home for the months we were there.
I would wholeheartedly recommend Oasis tourist park to anyone travelling to Darwin, especially to anyone who is making a caravan their home for a few months or more.
Busy park with shady spots. Pool is good, but half the amenities need updating.

Great place to spend a few nights. We had a caravan site so can't speak to the cabins. The amenities are very clean and easily accessible from anywhere in grounds. The older blocks are by the camp kitchen with the newer ones close to reception. The camp kitchen has all sorts of appliances available including a older hot plate cook top. BBQs throughout the park. There is a large pool as well. Laundry facilities are available at each amenity block and they have a washer that takes card for $5/load. Everywhere was very clean.

The staff here are excellent, friendly, helpful and a pleasure to deal with. They suggested various places to check out. You can't really walk anywhere from here but it's very quiet at night so it's a trade off. The only issue we had was the next site parking their Ute blocking ours on on our site, we had to continuously ask them to move it. Not the parks fault.

Fantastic, well maintained park. Shady small and larger caravan sites. Owner is constantly upgrading facilities. My wife loves the camp kitchen and BBQs. Great little swimming pool, under shade.  It’s the nicest park we have stayed in during our trips around Oz. Highly recommend

Great park, shady sites, spotless amenities, laundry facilities excellent. Ben is so helpful. Due to us having to have some repairs done, it wasn’t any trouble for Ben to allow us to stay extra days. This is a very well managed park and I thoroughly recommend it.
Dawn & Doug
Not the closest park to Darwin but Darwin isn't that big or busy so not an issue. Very leafy park. Sites were situated amongst trees.  Shops near by. Toilets and showers good. Has a pool.

I stayed for 4 months in my van. Pool, amenities and camp kitchen always maintained and clean. Any issues eg water tap were fixed immediately.
Friendly team, beautiful grounds.

Excellent park! About 20 mins from Darwin, but it’s an easy drive & doesn’t feel that far out. Park is beautiful & green & feels very tropical. ||Cabins are pretty small but nice & comfortable. Could perhaps do with some improvements though, like including a bin in the bathroom, some more utensils & plates, a Tupperware container for food storage or even just to cook in, etc in the kitchen. Kitchen was actually very lacking in handy items. I know the camp kitchen is decked out with everything provided, but when you pay so much for a cabin, you should have these things included in your own space. Just a suggestion.||Camp kitchen is fantastic. What a great space for the many backpackers - has everything you need. We even left a few items in there like glad wrap, sandwich bags, etc that we had to buy for our cabin, which we know would come in handy for the next visitors. ||Pool is beautiful. & overall feel in the park is very friendly & fun. We loved seeing the 5pm happy hour visitors to Ben’s Bar each day - just lots of happy, relaxed visitors around, enjoying the magic weather. ||Park isn’t very big, but it is packed full of friendly visitors. Lovely place to stay. Mostly backpackers & grey nomads in the park, not a lot to do for kids. ||Would definitely stay here again & highly recommend for visitors, perhaps without young kids.

Just a very special park.  Thanks Ben and all your amazing staff.  We loved our two month stay.  You really feel like your in a lovely resort.   Can't wait to come back next year.  Best park we have stayed in.  Warmest Di and Ross Edwards and our furbaby Max
Stayed at Oasis for 3 nights in a campervan, facilities were incredible and camp kitchen was super clean. Easy to book over the phone and arrive after hours too. Highly recommend!!!
Great park, really enjoyed all the facilities and staff

Very accommodating!
Perfect location to explore Darwin and surrounding areas!
Highly recommend!

Dy is a lovely host, we arrived late to Darwin and realised we wrongly booked at Oasis Cooberpedy with similar name (make sure you don't do our mistake!). Dy didn't leave us stranded. even though their campsite was fully booked, she helped by calling alternative locations and eventually found us a parking place at the premises to stay at overnight. I wholeheartedly recommend this place it's clean with great facilities and close to the city centre.

We arrived after sunset, realizing that we mistakenly got to the “wrong park” with our camper-van.  The amazing Dy tried to help in every possible way, helped us calling other camp sites but all were booked out. Eventually with her partner, they improvised a spot for us to stay the night. They both were VERY friendly and helpful and me and my friends can’t thank them enough.
The facility was great too! A very nice place, perfect location, clean showers and equipped kitchen offered for the guests.

Awesome park, lots of shade.
The staff were very accommodating when we booked in last minute.
The pool is small but lovely.

We stayed here last night and have to say it is the nicest park we have ever stayed in! So wished we could’ve stayed here longer, but the place was fully booked showing it’s popularity! The owners have done an amazing job in giving the park a peaceful and resort-like vibe. Lots of shade and great prices too. 100% recommend Oasis!
I've stayed here for 3 months at a time for a number of years now. So come to your own conclusion as to whether I like it.

This place is a nice tourist park very helpful and great communication great camp kitchen facilities and very friendly owners they even had a Mario car which I got a photo off 😂
Powered site was a bit hard had to use two extension leads but still worked well also had a bit of an issue with getting covered in fire ants when sitting out side the tent but no other issues at all will highly recommend to anyone thanks

A great place to be friendly owners and staff these people go our of their way to make your stay enjoyable, all facilities clean, pool is perfect with shade and sun lounges available. Camp kitchen has been updated and this facility is available to everyone. Through our stay we have been provided with a couple of entertainment nights that are really enjoyable, we really enjoyed our stay and would comeback again thanks Ben

Just spent 5 nights at the Oasis Tourist Park Ben and his team helped us in to our Caravan site,great amenities ,this park is easy access to all activities.Highly recommend this park to base yourself close to Darwin .Will definitely stay again Thanks Ben for a very enjoyable stay.
Clean amenities, friendly owners. Can highly recommend this park
